series_metadata.series_description: proof of publication provided by newspapers regarding publication of ordinances, public hearings, bid solicitations, payment of bills, public sales, etc.; record provides only evidence of publication SEE ALSO: (below) Legal Case Records
affidavits that provide supplementary evidence of publication SEE ALSO: (below) Legal Case Records

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Received or created PLUS: 3 years THEN: Destroy

series_metadata.series_description: certificates of authentication issued by the agency
records documenting delegations of power to authorize agency business; includes signature authorities and powers of attorney

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Superseded/Obsolete PLUS: 1 year THEN: Destroy

series_metadata.series_description: records conferring perpetual legal permission; includes copyright permission requests and requests for permission to publish intellectual property or holdings of the agency; also includes copyrights, patents, and trademarks held by the agency
one-time copyright permissions granted by the agency

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Expiration PLUS: 3 years THEN: Destroy

series_metadata.series_description: records documenting consent and waiving the individual’s right to hold the agency responsible for injuries or damages occurring while voluntarily participating in events or activities; also includes consent forms for publicity purposes SEE ALSO: , (below); Field Trip Authorizations (EDUCATION) SettlementsTort Claims

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Termination of release/waiver PLUS: 5 years THEN: Destroy*

series_metadata.series_description: records promulgated by the Department of Transportation concerning approved statewide traffic ordinances for speed limits, no parking zones, route number changes, bridge weight limits, and other traffic ordinances; includes Certificate of Rulemaking (COR), municipal certificate for traffic ordinance requiring concurrent approval, and other related records

records concerning vessel titles issued by the Wildlife Resources Commission; includes title transfers, applications, lien releases, bills of sale, original manufacturer’s statements of origin, and other related records

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Canceled/transferred PLUS: 3 years THEN: Destroy

series_metadata.series_description: records concerning vehicle titles issued by the Department of Transportation; includes title transfers, applications, lien releases, bills of sale, original manufacturer’s statements of origin, and other related records

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Issued PLUS: 20 years THEN: Destroy NOTE: After 20 years, the Division shall maintain a record of the last two owners

series_metadata.series_description: Industrial Commission records concerning determination of a claimant’s eligibility and awards to eligible claimants; includes claims, medical records, correspondence, determinations, appeals, payment information, records of hearings, and other related records

tracking_data.comments: Transfer to the State Records Center 3 years after final decision. Records will transfer immediately to the custody of the Archives.

series_metadata.series_description: records concerning contested cases at Office of Administrative Hearings involving state agencies; includes petitions, orders, transcripts, pleadings, and other related records

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Closed PLUS: 50 years ΩTHEN: Destroy

tracking_data.comments: Transfer to the State Records Center after case is closed. Records will be held for agency 50 additional years and then destroyed.

series_metadata.series_description: records concerning administrative hearings involving individuals or other entities held by occupational licensing boards, the State Banking Commission, the Commissioner of Banks, the Credit Union Division of the Department of Commerce, the Department of Insurance and the Commissioner of Insurance, the State Chief Information Officer, and the North Carolina State Building Code Council; includes notices, pleadings, motions, and intermediate rulings, questions and offers of proof, objections, and rulings thereon, evidence, findings and exceptions, decisions, opinions, orders, or reports, and other related records SEE ALSO: Investigation and Hearing Records (MONITORING AND COMPLIANCE)

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Closed PLUS: 3 years THEN: Destroy

series_metadata.series_description: recordings of hearings as well as minutes

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Closed or final disposition of hearing request PLUS: 10 years THEN: Destroy

series_metadata.series_title: Workers’ Compensation Program Claims NOTE: All official copies of claims records should be transferred to the North Carolina Industrial Commission (NCIC) in compliance with G.S. § 97-92(a) (continued on following page)
series_metadata.series_description: records concerning workers’ compensation claims with the Industrial Commission (NCIC); includes NCIC forms, correspondence, reports of accidents and occupational disease, medical records, deposition and hearing transcripts, compensation documentation, NCIC decisions, and other related records
series_metadata.legal_citation: Confidentiality G.S. § 97-92 Retention Hyler v. GTE Prods. Co., 333 N. C. 258, 425 S.E.2d 698 (1993)

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Received PLUS: 60 years THEN: Destroy

series_metadata.series_title: Workers’ Compensation Program Claims NOTE: All official copies of claims records should be transferred to the North Carolina Industrial Commission (NCIC) in compliance with G.S. § 97-92(a) (continued on following page)
series_metadata.series_description: employee reports of injury to NCIC to which no file number is assigned

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Received PLUS: 2 years THEN: Destroy*

series_metadata.series_description: records concerning intrastate and interstate compacts

series_metadata.series_title: Contracts: documents negotiated with vendors and firms concerning services, equipment, property, and other obligations; includes all document references within contract and relevant correspondence; also includes memoranda of agreement (MOA), memoranda of understanding (MOU), Service Level Agreements (SLA), Statements of Work (SOW), and Non-Disclosure Agreements (NDA)
series_metadata.series_description: sealed contracts SEE ALSO: (below), Grants Management (FINANCIAL MANAGEMENT), Construction Management (INFRASTRUCTURE MANAGEMENT) Real Property Records

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Expiration or termination PLUS: 10 years THEN: Destroy*

series_metadata.series_title: Contracts: documents negotiated with vendors and firms concerning services, equipment, property, and other obligations; includes all document references within contract and relevant correspondence; also includes memoranda of agreement (MOA), memoranda of understanding (MOU), Service Level Agreements (SLA), Statements of Work (SOW), and Non-Disclosure Agreements (NDA)
series_metadata.series_description: contracts relating to capital improvements or business associate agreements SEE ALSO: (below), Grants Management (FINANCIAL MANAGEMENT), Construction Management (INFRASTRUCTURE MANAGEMENT) Real Property Records
series_metadata.legal_citation: Retention G.S. § 1-50(a)(5) 45 CFR 164.316 Confidentiality G.S. § 143-52 01 NCAC 05B .1903

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Expiration or termination PLUS: 6 years THEN: Destroy*

series_metadata.series_title: Contracts: documents negotiated with vendors and firms concerning services, equipment, property, and other obligations; includes all document references within contract and relevant correspondence; also includes memoranda of agreement (MOA), memoranda of understanding (MOU), Service Level Agreements (SLA), Statements of Work (SOW), and Non-Disclosure Agreements (NDA)
series_metadata.series_description: all remaining contracts (i.e., not sealed or related to capital improvements) SEE ALSO: (below), Grants Management (FINANCIAL MANAGEMENT), Construction Management (INFRASTRUCTURE MANAGEMENT) Real Property Records

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Expiration or supersession PLUS: 3 years THEN: Destroy*

tracking_data.comments: Transfer to the State Records Center after 5 years. Records will be held for agency 23 additional years and then destroyed.

series_metadata.series_description: records documenting restrictions and compliance with license and copyright provisions for products and services purchased by the agency

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Superseded/Obsolete PLUS: 1 year THEN: Destroy

series_metadata.series_description: contracts log maintained by the Department of Administration of all contracts valued at more than $1 million entered into by state agencies
records concerning agreements granted by outside entities to the agency; also includes maps or drawings detailing construction plans attached to agreements SEE ALSO: (below) Real Property Records

records concerning active and completed agreements granted to utilities, municipalities, businesses, and private property owners to encroach upon state property SEE ALSO: (below) Real Property Records

titles, deeds, conveyances, or other instruments whereby the state or any state agency or institution has acquired title to any real property, as deposited with the Department of the Secretary of State SEE ALSO: Accession Records (ASSET MANAGEMENT) SEE ALSO: (above) Encroachment Agreements
records concerning easements granted to the agency SEE ALSO: Accession Records (ASSET MANAGEMENT) SEE ALSO: (above) Encroachment Agreements

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Expiration PLUS: 10 years THEN: Destroy*

series_metadata.series_description: leases negotiated by the agency to rent land or buildings for a specified period of time SEE ALSO: Accession Records (ASSET MANAGEMENT) SEE ALSO: (above) Encroachment Agreements

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Expiration PLUS: 6 years THEN: Destroy*

series_metadata.series_description: records concerning open and completed right-of-way projects by the Department of Transportation; includes appraisal cost records, budget records, deeds, judgments, correspondence, notarized right-of-way agreements signed by property owners, and reports detailing the costs and progress of right-of-way activities
records concerning pre-litigation or informal settlements

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Expiration PLUS: 10 years THEN: Destroy

series_metadata.series_description: titles to state-owned vehicles SEE ALSO: (above) Vehicle and Vessel Titles

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Disposition of vehicle THEN: Transfer to new owner

series_metadata.series_description: records concerning Court of Appeals proceedings and legal arguments; includes original opinions, judgments, and certificates of satisfaction of costs

tracking_data.comments: Transfer to the State Records Center when reference value ends for immediate transfer to the custody of the Archives.

series_metadata.series_description: docket sheets concerning each case in the Court of Appeals

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Adjudicated PLUS: 10 years THEN: Destroy

series_metadata.series_description: briefs, correspondence, motions, and petitions concerning each case in the Court of Appeals

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Adjudicated PLUS: 5 years THEN: Destroy

series_metadata.series_description: file maintained by the Administrative Office of the Courts containing the names of those people for whom it received a notice under G.S. § 15A-150

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Received PLUS: 80 years THEN: Destroy

series_metadata.series_description: records concerning legal requests for action by the Court of Appeals on matters where no appeal lies of right or where no record on appeal is filed in the Court (e.g., Petition for Writ of Certiorari)

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Received PLUS: 5 years THEN: Destroy

series_metadata.series_description: agreements filed with the Department of the Secretary of State; includes health care powers of attorney, declarations of a desire for a natural death, advance instructions for mental health treatment, and declarations of an anatomical gift

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Received PLUS: 100 years THEN: Destroy NOTE: If the agency is notified of revocation of registration, records may be destroyed at that point

series_metadata.series_description: charters, amendments, articles of incorporation, and other creation documents recorded and filed with the Department of the Secretary of State

historic charters and amendments dating from the 1880s to 1960s recorded and filed with the Department of the Secretary of State; includes both accepted and denied petitions, drawings, and correspondence

tracking_data.comments: Transfer to the State Records Center when reference value ends for immediate transfer to the custody of the Archives.

series_metadata.series_description: notices of liens, certificates, and other notices affecting federal tax liens or other federal liens that must be filed with the Department of the Secretary of State
records concerning those who have secured a loan on commercial or agricultural property by filing with the Department of the Secretary of State, per Uniform Commercial Code (UCC)

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Effectiveness lapses PLUS: 1 year THEN: Destroy

series_metadata.series_description: copies of all executed memoranda of understanding and agreements of a noncommercial nature otherwise subject to disclosure under the public record laws of this state, entered into by the State of North Carolina, or any agency of the state, and a foreign government and filed by the state agency with the Secretary of State
annexation ordinances and maps submitted by North Carolina municipalities to the Department of the Secretary of State

tracking_data.comments: Transfer to the State Records Center when reference value ends for immediate transfer to the custody of the Archives.

series_metadata.series_description: maps of county and state boundaries, rivers, roads, watersheds, and other locations recorded and filed with the Department of the Secretary of State
reports of licensing boards filed with the Department of the Secretary of State

tracking_data.comments: Transfer to the State Records Center when reference value ends for immediate transfer to the custody of the Archives.

series_metadata.series_description: records documenting ordinances, rules, regulations, etc. promulgated by entities required to file with the Department of the Secretary of State

tracking_data.comments: Transfer to the State Records Center when reference value ends for immediate transfer to the custody of the Archives.

series_metadata.series_description: formal opinions written by the Attorney General to state or local government officials or their attorneys regarding legal matters

tracking_data.comments: Transfer to the State Records Center when reference value ends for immediate transfer to the custody of the Archives.

series_metadata.series_description: advisory letters and opinions written by Department of Justice attorneys

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Complete PLUS: 10 years THEN: Destroy

series_metadata.series_description: advisory letters received from Department of Justice attorneys

records concerning declaratory rulings issued by the agency to interpret either statutes or rules as applied to a specified set of facts SEE ALSO: Investigation and Hearing Records (MONITORING AND COMPLIANCE)

records concerning compliance of providers and contractors with Federal nondiscrimination requirements; includes noncompliance complaints and documentation of resolution; also includes complaints and investigations pursuant to the Retaliatory Employment Discrimination Act (REDA)

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Resolution PLUS: 1 year THEN: Destroy

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Complete PLUS: 5 years THEN: Destroy

series_metadata.series_description: letters to private residents and organizations that request legal assistance from the Department of Justice SEE ALSO: Correspondence (AGENCY MANAGEMENT)

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Complete PLUS: 10 years THEN: Destroy

series_metadata.series_description: records concerning cases holding statewide significance SEE ALSO: RC No. 1527.2; Public Records Requests (PUBLIC RELATIONS)

tracking_data.comments: Transfer to the State Records Center when reference value ends for immediate transfer to the custody of the Archives.

series_metadata.series_description: records that accompany responsive documents to a subpoena for a case to which the responding entity is not a party SEE ALSO: RC No. 1527.2; Public Records Requests (PUBLIC RELATIONS)

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Submitted PLUS: 2 years THEN: Destroy

series_metadata.series_description: records concerning cases reviewed by the Innocence Inquiry Commission; includes claims, reviews, investigations, hearings, and other related records

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Closed PLUS: 50 years ΩTHEN: Destroy
